_doc: Declarative spec for Stripe products + prices consumed by scripts/stripe/seed-products.ts.
This file is NOT loaded at runtime — Stripe is the only runtime source of truth.
Edit + commit + run `pnpm tsx scripts/stripe/seed-products.ts` to upsert in test mode.
Use `--live` to apply against the live key (requires explicit confirmation).
Wave 1 launches all 5 markets + INTL fallback. PPP-adjusted; numbers indicative.
Stripe price unit_amount is in minor units (e.g. 9900 = 99.00).

products.name: Starter — Polska
products.description: Wszystko, czego potrzebujesz, aby zarządzać kontraktorami w Polsce. KSeF, JPK, B2B.

products.name: Pro — Polska
products.description: Pełna automatyzacja KSeF + integracje + OCR. Dla rosnących zespołów.

products.name: Enterprise — Polska
products.description: Audyt, SLA, API, dedykowane wsparcie i custom workflows.

products.name: Starter — Deutschland
products.description: ZUGFeRD-fähig, GoBD-konform. Schluss mit dem Scheinselbständigkeit-Risiko.

products.name: Pro — Deutschland
products.description: Volle Workflow-Automatisierung mit XRechnung, OCR und Compliance-Checks.

products.name: Enterprise — Deutschland
products.description: Audit Trail, SSO, API-Zugriff und dedizierter Account Manager.

products.name: Starter
products.description: Get your contractor admin under control. Onboarding, contracts, invoices.

products.name: Pro
products.description: Full lifecycle automation: e-invoicing, OCR, integrations, multi-step approvals.

products.name: Enterprise
products.description: SSO, audit, API, dedicated CSM and custom integrations.

products.name: Starter — UK
products.description: IR35-ready contractor admin. CIS, payroll handoff, HMRC-aware.

products.name: Pro — UK
products.description: Full IR35 status determination workflow, off-payroll reporting, deemed-employer logic.

products.name: Enterprise — UK
products.description: Audit, API, SSO, dedicated CSM. SLA-backed.

products.name: Starter — UAE
products.description: Peppol PINT-AE ready. Corporate tax onboarding for free zone + mainland.

products.name: Pro — UAE
products.description: Full e-invoicing automation with Peppol PINT-AE, WPS payroll integration.

products.name: Enterprise — UAE
products.description: Multi-emirate, SSO, API, CSM, audit. SLA-backed.

products.name: Starter — KSA
products.description: ZATCA Fatoorah Phase 2 ready. Withholding tax tracking.

products.name: Pro — KSA
products.description: Full ZATCA integration, e-invoice clearance, withholding-tax automation.

products.name: Enterprise — KSA
products.description: Multi-region, SSO, API, CSM, audit. SLA-backed.
